description_long: This is a modern digital keyboard piano with a rectangular body and a full set of keys, supported by an X-shaped metal stand. The keyboard features a standard arrangement of white and black keys, with a slim, elongated profile typical of portable stage pianos. The stand is constructed from tubular metal, crossing at the center for stability and ending in flat feet for secure placement on the ground. The piano's casing appears to be made of plastic or composite material, with a matte finish and minimal decorative elements. No pedals or music stand are visible, and the design is streamlined for easy transport and setup in urban environments. The overall color scheme is a combination of light gray and darker gray tones.
description: A portable digital keyboard piano with a full set of keys, supported by an X-shaped metal stand and finished in shades of gray.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full keyboard, X-shaped stand, and both end panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the keyboard and the single flat foot of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the keyboard and the crossing point of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the keyboard's depth and the stand's structure.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with approximately 36 white keys and 25 black keys in alternating groups, no split or missing keys.
